## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Build/CI

## Testing

- [ ] `./gradlew test`
- [ ] `./gradlew assembleDebug`
- [ ] Tested on a real Android device
- [ ] Not tested

## Screenshots Or Demo

Add screenshots or a short video for UI changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] I removed stream keys, private URLs, credentials, and local paths from logs/screenshots.
- [ ] I preserved RootEncoder copyright and license headers.
- [ ] I updated documentation if behavior changed.
- [ ] I kept the pull request focused.
